positive: Stylized minimal illustration of a majestic celestial creature, like a cosmic griffin or nebula phoenix, soaring over a stylized geometric landscape. The creature should have a flowing, ethereal form with vibrant bioluminescent edges (teal, deep indigo, gold) against a contrasting dark space background. Composition must feature a strong central silhouette against negative space, making it highly visible for apparel printing. Use clean lines, strong contrast, and an intricate yet scalable vector art aesthetic, reminiscent of Art Deco or Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, but modernized. Include subtle galactic dust trails and stylized planetary rings in the background. Perfect for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low detail, photograph, realism, messy, cluttered
